title: 2025 12 01 - HE (Part 2)
displayTitle: 2025-12-01 - Health Committee - 2024/25 Annual review of the Pharmaceutical Management Agency (PHARMAC) [Part 2]
topic: 2024/25 Annual review of the Pharmaceutical Management Agency (PHARMAC)
description: Monday 1 December 2025 | Health Committee 2024/25 Annual review of the Pharmaceutical Management Agency (PHARMAC) Pharmaceutical Management Agency Natalie McMurtry, Chief Executive Hon Paula Bennett, Board Chair Margaret Wilsher, Board Member Michael Johnson, Director Strategy, Policy and Performance Adrienne Martin, Director Pharmaceuticals Catherine Epps, Director Medical Devices Graham Durston, Manager Finance Oliver Whitehead, Team Leader Government Services Matthew McCrorie, Communications Team Leader
descriptionSummary: 2024/25 Annual review of the Pharmaceutical Management Agency (PHARMAC). Pharmaceutical Management Agency. Natalie McMurtry, Chief Executive
